overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a medieval armored character walking through a candlelit Gothic cathedral interior with stained glass windows, stone benches, and a central red carpet, eventually exiting into a bright sunlit garden. The environment features detailed stone architecture with warm lighting mixing natural window light and interior candles.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral nave with central red carpet and side benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the central red carpet toward the altar area, passing stone benches on the right

notable_agents.action: hooded figure sitting motionless on a stone bench near the altar

entered.detail: long crimson carpet running down the center aisle of the cathedral
tall Gothic stained glass window with blue and orange panels casting colored light
stone pews with orange cloth coverings lining the right side
raised stone platform with candles at the far end of the nave
massive stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks down the central aisle of a Gothic cathedral nave, following a long red carpet toward a distant altar. Stained glass windows cast colored light onto the stone floor while a lone hooded figure sits motionless on a bench to the right. The space is grand and solemn with tall stone pillars lining the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: side aisle with wall monuments and arched windows

events.description: character turns left off the central red carpet into the side aisle
passing closer to stained glass windows increases colored light patterns on the floor

agents.ego_description: turning left into the side aisle and walking past wall monuments and tall stained glass windows

entered.detail: stone wall with arched monument niches and decorative carvings
tall iron stand with lit candles providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrower side aisle, leaving the red carpet behind. The camera passes close to stained glass windows on the left that cast vibrant colored light onto the stone floor. Wall monuments and decorative niches line the left wall while candle stands provide warm interior lighting. The stone benches recede into the background on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral exit vestibule leading to garden

events.description: approaching the large stone archway exit with outdoor garden visible ahead
exiting the dim candlelit interior into bright natural sunlight of the garden

agents.ego_description: walking toward and through the stone archway exit into the sunlit garden area with green trees

entered.detail: large Gothic stone archway with open wooden doors leading outside
sunlit garden with green trees and grass visible through the doorway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the cathedral exit, where a large stone archway frames a view of a bright sunlit garden with lush green trees. The lighting shifts dramatically from the warm candlelit interior to brilliant natural daylight as the character walks through the doorway. The interior wall monuments and candle stands fall behind as the outdoor space dominates the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a solemn Gothic cathedral that gradually transitions into a brilliant, sunlit garden. It begins by following a character down a grand central aisle along a red carpet, passing tall stone pillars and a motionless hooded figure under the colored glow of stained glass. As the character turns left, the scene shifts into a narrower side aisle where the camera glides past decorative wall monuments and warm candle stands that cast a soft light across the stone floor. The perspective then moves toward a large stone archway, where the dim interior lighting dramatically gives way to intense natural daylight. Finally, the camera passes through the doorway, leaving the cathedral's architecture behind as the view opens up to a lush green garden.
